Interface TenantBaseCustom

All Known Subinterfaces:
TenantJpaRepository, TenantJpaRepository, TenantJpaRepositoryCustom, TenantJpaRepositoryCustom
All Known Implementing Classes:
TenantBaseImpl, TenantJpaRepositoryImpl
public interface TenantBaseCustom
Custom repository interface for tenant-specific data operations. Provides functionality for data deletion and export operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteManagedClientData(User clientUser)
    Deletes all data, the tenant and the user account of the given managed client.
    void
    deleteMyDataAndUserAccount()
    Deletes all personal data and user account for the currently authenticated user.
    AccountDeletionEligibility
    getAccountDeletionEligibility(User user)
    Read-only evaluation of whether the given user may delete their own account.
    void
    getExportPersonalDataAsZip(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
    Exports all personal data for the currently authenticated user as a ZIP file.

  • Method Details

    • deleteMyDataAndUserAccount

      void deleteMyDataAndUserAccount() throws Exception
      Deletes all personal data and user account for the currently authenticated user. This operation removes all user-specific data from the system and cannot be undone.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the deletion operation fails or user is not authenticated

    • getAccountDeletionEligibility

      AccountDeletionEligibility getAccountDeletionEligibility(User user)
      Read-only evaluation of whether the given user may delete their own account. Returns the same conditions that deleteMyDataAndUserAccount() enforces (still managing clients, or others still reading the home tenant), so the frontend can warn the user up front instead of submitting a deletion that would be rejected. Changes no data.
      Parameters:
      user - the user whose self-deletion eligibility is evaluated
      Returns:
      the deletion eligibility (DELETABLE, HAS_CLIENTS or HAS_VIEWERS)

    • deleteManagedClientData

      void deleteManagedClientData(User clientUser) throws Exception
      Deletes all data, the tenant and the user account of the given managed client. Uses the same complete-deletion engine as deleteMyDataAndUserAccount() but for an explicitly supplied user instead of the authenticated user, so an advisor can remove a client they manage. Authorization (the advisor must hold a MANAGE grant on the client's tenant) must be checked by the caller. Cannot be undone.
      Parameters:
      clientUser - the read-only client user whose tenant and account are to be deleted
      Throws:
      Exception - if the deletion operation fails

    • getExportPersonalDataAsZip

      void getExportPersonalDataAsZip(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response) throws Exception
      Exports all personal data for the currently authenticated user as a ZIP file. The ZIP contains SQL scripts with table structures and user data.
      Parameters:
      response - the HTTP response to write the ZIP file to
      Throws:
      Exception - if the export operation fails or user is not authenticated
